claim_bullets.bullet_text: Lamia need bloodsucking to survive, often disguise as human girls (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.188-198).
Lizardmen have noble and slave types, with nobles using dragon roar magic (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.188-198).
Unicorns have healing abilities, can communicate in silent spirit, unknown lifespan (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.188-198).

source_record_text: Section 13.2.6 describes mythical and magical beasts, including lamia, lizardmen, griffon, manticore, minotaur, unicorn, lynx, sphinx, wyvern, basilisk, sea dragon, wyrm, buckbaird, hydra, and humbaba (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.188-198).
